TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ruben_Boumtje-Boumtje, title = Ruben_Boumtje-Boumtje, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ruben_Boumtje-Boumtje} }

S.FORM: Ruben Boumtje-Boumtje sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 5, Ruben Boumtje-Boumtje, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ruben Boumtje-Boumtje sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 5, Ruben Boumtje-Boumtje, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ruβen βoumtje-βoumtje s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ruβen βoumtje-βoumtje, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
